title: Add openrouter conversation component registration
body:
Signed-off-by: Joni Collinge <jonathancollinge@live.com>

# Description
Adds the openrouter converstaion component registration from https://github.com/dapr/components-contrib/pull/4334 - will require a go.mod bump once that is merged.
<!--
Please explain the changes you've made.
-->

## Issue reference

<!--
We strive to have all PR being opened based on an issue, where the problem or feature have been discussed prior to implementation.
-->

Please reference the issue this PR will close: #_[issue number]_

## Checklist

Please make sure you've completed the relevant tasks for this PR, out of the following list:

- [ ] Code compiles correctly
- [ ] Created/updated tests
- [ ] Unit tests passing
- [ ] End-to-end tests passing
- [ ] Extended the documentation / Created issue in the <https://github.com/dapr/docs/> repo: dapr/docs#_[issue number]_
- [ ] Specification has been updated / Created issue in the <https://github.com/dapr/docs/> repo: dapr/docs#_[issue number]_
- [ ] Provided sample for the feature / Created issue in the <https://github.com/dapr/docs/> repo: dapr/docs#_[issue number]_

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,27 @@
+//go:build allcomponents
+
+/*

+Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
+you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
+You may obtain a copy of the License at
+

+distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
+WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
+See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
+limitations under the License.
+*/
+
+package components
+
+import (
+	"github.com/dapr/components-contrib/conversation/openrouter"
+	"github.com/dapr/dapr/pkg/components/conversation"
+)
+
+func init() {
+	conversation.DefaultRegistry.RegisterComponent(openrouter.NewOpenRouter, "openrouter")
+}
